name: Fudge Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Melt butter over low heat; add cocoa and stir until smooth.
3. Remove from heat; cool slightly.
4. Stir in sugar, salt, eggs, and corn syrup until blended thoroughly.
5. Stir in chopped nuts if desired.
6. Pour into unbaked pie shell.
7. Place pecan halves on top.
8. Bake for 40 minutes.
9. Allow to cool completely before serving.
10. Let stand for 8 hours before serving.
11. Garnish with sweetened whipped cream or whipped topping.
